description: Root collection stores root entity fields and references to related entities.
Single entity collection optimized for direct lookup by primary key.
Embed low-risk associated data inside the root document.
Use references and/or denormalized summaries for associated entities.
Represent associative relationships as explicit edge/relationship collections.
Embed associative edges near the source root when fanout is manageable.
Use references, edge collections, and optional reverse indexes for volatile/shared associative relationships.
Baseline containment layout with parent-child references.
Embed contained child entities inside the root document when risk is low.
Use partial embedding, references, and summaries for containment paths with fanout/sharedness/volatility risk.
